description_text: This listing is for 4 pieces (2 L & 2 R) 100% Brand New & High Quality Front Bumper Canards Splitters. It can give you a very sport looking, but also can protect your front side bumper from scratches or small bump damages. Give your vehicle a nice aggressive and affordable sporty look by adding this front bumper canard. UV-Protected Coating, 100% Weather Proof. Feature: Quantity: 4Pcs Color: Glossy Carbon Fiber Material: ABS & Carbon fiber Pattern Fitment: Universal fit most of cars Size: As the pictures shown Package Included: 2 small & 2 big canards and installation hardware 1. Payment must be received within 7 business after you buy it. 2. All major credit cards are accepted through secure payment processor PayPal. 1. We ship to your eBay or Paypal address. Please make sure your eBay address is correct before you pay. 2. Items will be shipped within 1-4 business day when we received payment.
